summary: Iteration 143 - Frontend testing for 4 UI restructuring changes. 3 of 4 features verified via code review. 1 CRITICAL BUG found: Tax Loss Harvesting tabs not switching in UnifiedTaxCentre.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Tabs not switching when clicked. Clicking 'Tax Loss Harvesting' tab does not change tab state (ariaSelected stays 'false', dataState stays 'inactive'). Content remains on 'Tax Analysis' instead of switching to Tax Loss Harvesting.
ui_bugs.reproduction_steps: 1. Navigate to /tax-analysis-sync, 2. Click 'Tax Loss Harvesting' tab, 3. Observe tab state doesn't change and content doesn't switch

issues: ComplianceModal appears on every page visit - requires checkbox + accept each time

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix UnifiedTaxCentre tab switching - tabs are not responding to clicks. The Tabs component state is not updating when tabs are clicked.
Investigate why tab click events are not propagating or state is not updating in UnifiedTaxCentre.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedInvestments.jsx: TABS array correctly sorted alphabetically after Overview - 11 tabs: Overview, Bonds, Cash & TDs, Crypto, Managed Funds, Property, Rebalancing, Shares & ETFs, SMSF, Super & Pension, Unlisted
TaxLossHarvesting.jsx: Uses pure client-side calculation (no API call) - analyzeHarvesting() function calculates tax loss harvesting opportunities locally
UnifiedClientOverview.jsx: 5 tabs correctly defined - Overview, Actions, Retirement, Tax Centre, Transactions with correct data-testid attributes
navData.js clientContextNav: Overview section has only 'Client Overview', Planning has only 'Budget' and 'Goals & Scenarios' - Actions moved to Overview tabs as required
UnifiedTaxCentre.jsx: Tab structure looks correct but tabs are not switching when clicked - possible issue with Radix UI Tabs component or event handling

success_rate.frontend: 75% (3/4 features verified, 1 critical bug blocking Tax Loss Harvesting)

context_for_next_testing_agent: UnifiedTaxCentre tabs are broken - clicking tabs doesn't switch content. The tab click event is received but state doesn't update. Debug showed: before click ariaSelected='false', after click ariaSelected='false' (no change). This blocks testing of Tax Loss Harvesting feature. Other features (UnifiedInvestments tabs, UnifiedClientOverview tabs, navData structure) verified via code review and appear correct.

investments_tabs_alphabetical.details: 11 tabs verified in alphabetical order after Overview: Overview, Bonds, Cash & TDs, Crypto, Managed Funds, Property, Rebalancing, Shares & ETFs, SMSF, Super & Pension, Unlisted. All tabs have correct data-testid attributes.

tax_loss_harvesting.details: CRITICAL BUG: Cannot test Tax Loss Harvesting because UnifiedTaxCentre tabs are not switching. Clicking 'Tax Loss Harvesting' tab does not change content from 'Tax Analysis'. Tab state remains inactive after click.

client_overview_tabs.details: UnifiedClientOverview.jsx has 5 tabs: Overview, Actions, Retirement, Tax Centre, Transactions. Each tab has correct data-testid. Requires client context (selected_client + app_mode='adviser') to display.

client_context_nav.details: navData.js clientContextNav: Overview section has only 'Client Overview'. Planning has only 'Budget' and 'Goals & Scenarios'. No 'Actions', 'Retirement', or 'Tax Centre' as separate nav items.

mocked_apis_list: Tax Loss Harvesting uses pure client-side calculation (no API call)

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Unknown - tab click events are received but Radix UI Tabs state is not updating. Possible causes: 1) Event propagation blocked, 2) State management issue, 3) Conflicting tab contexts (TaxAnalysisSync has nested tabs)
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe: Tab state doesn't change, content remains on 'Tax Analysis'
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Main agent should investigate UnifiedTaxCentre.jsx Tabs component. Check if there's a conflict with nested tabs in TaxAnalysisSync or if the Tabs value/onValueChange is properly connected.
